ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 4 XXS, 6 XS) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code for the size (e.g., AUS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the size belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the size belongs to */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is a custom size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust_inch" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_inch" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips_cm" REAL /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_inch" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_inch" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_inch" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_inch" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "thigh_cm" REAL /* Thigh measurement in centimeters */,
  "thigh_inch" REAL /* Thigh measurement in inches */,
  "cuff_cm" REAL /* Cuff measurement in centimeters */,
  "cuff_inch" REAL /* Cuff measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit (e.g., Centimeter, Inch) */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the measurement unit (e.g., cm, in) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "clothing_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing line the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the size chart belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the size chart belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the size chart belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the size chart belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_clothing_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_line_id") REFERENCES clothing_lines ("clothing_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the brand was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_lines" (
  "clothing_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing line */,
  "clothing_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing line */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the line belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the line belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the line belongs to */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the clothing line is a custom line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the clothing line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the clothing line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_lines_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_lines_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_lines_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is a custom category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Casual, Formal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the type is a custom type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Manager) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view size chart, edit measurement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
